sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 110 of 2024 Special STRA 111 of 2024 Special STRA 112 of 2024 Special STRA 113 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 01.04.2026 Mr. Muhammad Immad Qamar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Hasham Mehtab, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Akhtar Ali Memon, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Muhammad Shamim, Commissioner IR, FBR, Karachi It is jointly stated that the impugned order does not make any reference to the case of exchequer. It is sought that it would be in the interest of justice and revenue that impugned order be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Commissioner for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. It is further sought that pending aforesaid no coercive action arising here from be taken against the respondent. Reference applications are disposed of in the above terms. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
